ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_familiarity" REAL /* Measure of the artist's familiarity */,
  "artist_hotttnesss" REAL /* Measure of the artist's popularity */,
  "artist_terms" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of terms associated with the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is most associated with */,
  "artist_description" TEXT /* Short description of the artist */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* Artist's official website */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* Artist's social media links (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was published */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the release is most associated with */,
  "release_description" TEXT /* Short description of the release */,
  "release_cover_art" TEXT /* URL of the release's cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "release_id" TEXT /* ID of the release the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "end_of_fade_in" REAL /* Time at which the fade-in of the track ends */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, where 0 is C, 1 is C#, etc.) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the track */,
  "fadedness" REAL /* Fadedness of the track */,
  "variability" INTEGER /* Variability of the track */,
  "key_string" TEXT /* Key of the track as a string (e.g., LA#) */,
  "mode_string" TEXT /* Mode of the track as a string (e.g., maj) */,
  "tonality" TEXT /* Tonality of the track (e.g., LA# maj) */,
  "avg_bars_start" REAL /* Average start time of bars in the track */,
  "avg_beats_start" REAL /* Average start time of beats in the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the track is most associated with */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "mood_tags" TEXT /* Mood tags (e.g., happy, sad, energetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, artist, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES user_playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the track (1-5) */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date the track was rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_feedback_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "play_duration" REAL /* Duration for which the track was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist-genre association */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_genres" (
  "release_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release-genre association */,
  "release_id" TEXT /* ID of the release */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_genres_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., energy, danceability) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date the track was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist1_id" TEXT /* ID of the first artist */,
  "artist2_id" TEXT /* ID of the second artist */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist2_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist2_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist1_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist1_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
